   WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WSORACTL.GLOBAL_NAME)

    WHERE WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT

    WHERE WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT

   ( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID WATLPTI,$$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD
    WHERE WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID

    AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE)

    WHERE WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID

  /*

    WHERE LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID )
    AND WSORACTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS') 
   ) 
   */
    /* Q3FY16 XAAS - RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY RETRIEVAL RI FAIL */

  /*  SELECT * FROM

   union all
   SELECT * FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN

   SELECT * FROM
   (SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN 
   union all
   SELECT CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN 
   )   LINE_EXTN 
 /*SIGORANT: MODIFIED AS PART OF Q2FY18 OPL OM MERGE*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN (select DISTINCT BK_LINE_REF_NUM from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE where LINE_STATUS_CD<>'Deleted') SOL   
	/*LEFT JOIN (select * from $$EXAASVWDB.N_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SO_LINE where order_line_status_cd<>'Deleted') SOL*/
	 /*ON SOL.CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY = LINE_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID : COMMENTED AS PART OF OCT8 CDR */
	 ON TRIM(SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM) = LINE_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID
     WHERE ( /*(SOL.CCW_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT  NULL)*/(SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM IS NOT  NULL)
     OR 
     (LINE_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID IS  NULL)))DVD) A 
       WHERE A.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WSORACTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
     )   AND  
	 (WSORACTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
	 OR (WSORACTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WSORACTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))) 
   )
     )

 CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 ,0) <=  0)  THEN 'N'

 ,WORCTL.ACTION_CODE 
 ,'I' AS DML_TYPE

 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)

 ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
 ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
 AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
 ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)

 /* ADDED AS PART OF FLEX INVOICE*/
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN

 LEFT JOIN   $$XAASVWDB.N_XAAS_SALES_ORDER NXSO
 ON (NXSO.WEB_ORDER_ID = WORCTL.ATTRIBUTE11
 /* AND NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_STATUS_CD='END_COMPLETED' -- webex changes: anvurity,sachkhur */
 /*
 AND NXSO.BK_SALES_ORDER_STATUS_CD='END-COMPLETE'
 AND NXSO.BK_SS_CD='SAAS_BRM'
 /*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q2FY15*/
 /* AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'))                        */

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID) + SMATKEY.MAX_VAL AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID	SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
FROM
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SMARTRX.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY),0) MAX_VAL 
 from $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMARTRX ) SMATKEY,
$$STGDB.WI_ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WORCTL
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
	ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN WIATLORDLND
	ON (WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
	AND WIATLORDLND.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
WHERE
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SMATRX
                        WHERE NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SMATRX.SS_CODE
                        AND WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SMATRX.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT)

SELECT
  SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,SAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,SATL_ADJD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
  ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
  ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE  
  ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
		WHEN COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
	ELSE WORCTL.LINE_TYPE END AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE                
  ,WORCTL.LINE_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_LINE_NUMBER_INT     
  ,WORCTL.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE       
  ,NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
  ,NACAR.BK_COMPANY_CD BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE           
  ,NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT  BK_SAF_ID_INT                 
  
  ,CASE 
  WHEN BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
  WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 'APPLIED'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN WIATLORDLND.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL OR WIATLORDLND.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0 THEN 'NON-APPLIED' ELSE 'APPLIED' END ) 
  END APPLIED_TRANSACTION_TYPE
  
  ,CASE WHEN WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =-9999 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AR_TRX_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ROLE   
  ,WORCTL.CREATION_DATE AR_TRX_LINE_CREATION_DATETIME 
  ,WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE    
  ,WORCTL.DESCRIPTION    
  
  ,CASE WHEN  (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  
   ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX' ,'ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))
  THEN 
  CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 ,0) <=  0)  THEN 'N' 
  ELSE 'Y' END
  ELSE '='  
  END RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG    

  ,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY

  ,CAST(CASE WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')) THEN COALESCE (LINE_EXTN_CDC.UNIQUE_ID , -999)
      WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND 
	  (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
	    OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))))
	  THEN COALESCE (LINE_EXTN.UNIQUE_ID , -999) 
	   WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('CSP-MARKETPLACE') ) THEN COALESCE (LINE_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID , -999)
	   WHEN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'ICMS-ADJ' AND LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') 	 AND POSITION('-' IN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN   TRIM(SUBSTR(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1))
	   WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') ) THEN COALESCE (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 , -999)
  ELSE -999 END AS BIGINT) SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT  /* populate LINE_REF_NUM from OPL here, handle through POST_SQL update for Zuora aka SaaS Reimagine*/
  
  ,CASE WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')) THEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN_CDC.SUBSCRIPTION_NUMBER , 'UNKNOWN')
       WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND 
	   (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
	   OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))))
	   THEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.SUBSCRIPTION_NUMBER , 'UNKNOWN')
  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END as SUBSCRIPTION_CD
  
  ,CASE WHEN WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' THEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN_CDC.OA_FLAG,'N') 
    ELSE  COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.OA_FLAG,'N')
 END AS RU_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_FLG 
  
  ,CASE WHEN  (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND   WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM' )) THEN COALESCE (SOL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , -6666)
       WHEN  (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND   
	   (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
	      OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))))
	  	THEN COALESCE (SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , -6666)
		WHEN   LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') THEN COALESCE (SOL_ACQ.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  , -6666)
  ELSE -6666 END as RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  /*handle through POST_SQL update for Zuora aka SaaS Reimagine*/  
  
  
    ,CASE WHEN (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
	 OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS')))
  THEN COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE7 , 'UNKNOWN')
  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END as SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
  
  CASE WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' AND  (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD')) )THEN COALESCE(SOL_ACQ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
    WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' AND  
	(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')  
	 OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))))
	THEN COALESCE(SOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
	WHEN   LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') THEN COALESCE (SOL_ACQ.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY , -6666)
  ELSE -999 END AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  /*handle through POST_SQL update for Zuora aka SaaS Reimagine*/  

  ,CASE WHEN (WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' 
  AND (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM') 
  OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))
  OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') ))
             THEN CAST(COALESCE(NP_TNC.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS BIGINT)
       ELSE -999 END AS CHANGED_ATO_CHILD_PRDT_KEY  
  ,COALESCE(MSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999) AS MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_KEY	 
  ,COALESCE(MSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999) AS MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  ,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE18,'UNKNOWN') AS MIGRATED_ORDER_CLSFCTN_CD
  ,COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME 
  ,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD 
  ,CASE WHEN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN('ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
THEN COALESCE(WORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN')
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.CXEA_SUPP_SKU_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CX_EA_PROGRAM_TRX_TYPE_NAME 
,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHD_NUMBER,-999) AS INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT
  ,WORCTL.ACTION_CODE 
  ,'I' AS DML_TYPE 
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WORCTL
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID WATLPTI
   ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD
   ON (WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN WIATLORDLND
   ON (WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND WIATLORDLND.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
  ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
   
   LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR
   ON (NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT=WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
    AND NACAR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ') AND (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9  IN ('ORDER ENTRY') OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))))
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON (WORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
   AND       WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL  
    ON (  WORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
    and   WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')
                 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
        ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
        AND            WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
 
   
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.CDC_XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN_CDC
  ON (LINE_EXTN_CDC.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
  AND WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC' )  
  
LEFT OUTER JOIN (select * from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE where LINE_STATUS_CD<>'Deleted'  and  BK_LINE_REF_NUM is not null
qualify ROW_NUMBER() OVER (partition by BK_LINE_REF_NUM order by SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY desc)=1) SOL
ON TRIM(SOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM) = LINE_EXTN.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID 

LEFT OUTER JOIN (select * from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE where LINE_STATUS_CD<>'Deleted'  and  BK_LINE_REF_NUM is not null
qualify ROW_NUMBER() OVER (partition by BK_LINE_REF_NUM order by SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY desc)=1) SOL1
ON TRIM(SOL1.BK_LINE_REF_NUM) = LINE_EXTN_CDC.CCW_ORDER_LINE_ID 

LEFT OUTER JOIN (select BK_LINE_REF_NUM,SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO 
ON NSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD IN ('ACQ-BSFT','CLOUD-CBM') AND NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_LINE_REF_NUM ORDER BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY DESC)=1) SOL_ACQ
ON TRIM(SOL_ACQ.BK_LINE_REF_NUM) = --WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 
CASE WHEN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT LIKE 'ICMS-ADJ' AND LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS') 	 AND POSITION('-' IN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)>0 THEN   TRIM(SUBSTR(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 ,1,  POSITION('-' IN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4)-1)) ELSE WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE4 END 
  
  
  
    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP_TNC
   ON (LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE10 = NP_TNC.BK_PRODUCT_ID
 AND       WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
  
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
      ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = COALESCE(WORCTL.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999))
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER MSO
 ON MSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =CAST(LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE19 AS BIGINT)
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE MSOL
 ON MSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =CAST(LINE_EXTN.ATTRIBUTE20 AS BIGINT)
	  	  
  WHERE  WORCTL.LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'  
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
  SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
  ,SAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
  ,SATL_ADJD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINAE_KEY       
  ,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
  ,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER              
  ,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE  
  ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
  WHEN COALESCE(NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID,'UNKNOWN') = 'FREIGHT' then 'FREIGHT'
  ELSE WORCTL.LINE_TYPE END AS BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
  ,WORCTL.LINE_NUMBER BK_AR_TRX_LINE_NUMBER_INT     
  ,WORCTL.REASON_CODE AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE       
  ,NACAR.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  BK_SAF_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
  ,NACAR.BK_COMPANY_CD BK_SAF_COMPANY_CODE           
  ,NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT  BK_SAF_ID_INT                 
  
  ,CASE WHEN WORCTL.LINE_TYPE='FREIGHT' THEN 'UNKNOWN' 
  WHEN COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') LIKE 'OM-FBINV%' THEN 'APPLIED'
    ELSE (CASE WHEN WIATLORDLND.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL OR WIATLORDLND.ORDER_LINE_ID = 0 THEN 'NON-APPLIED' ELSE 'APPLIED' END ) 
  END APPLIED_TRANSACTION_TYPE      
  ,CASE WHEN WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID =-9999 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AR_TRX_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ROLE   
  ,WORCTL.CREATION_DATE AR_TRX_LINE_CREATION_DATETIME 
  ,WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
  ,NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE    
  ,WORCTL.DESCRIPTION   
   ,CASE WHEN  (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN  ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX', 'WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX','XAAS','ICMS-XAAS','PP-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','CSP-MARKETPLACE','SAAS-RIMG-ONL','BSFT-ORDERS','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')  
OR (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('ORDER ENTRY TNC','ICMS-ADJ') AND WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9 IN ('XAAS'))
OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))
  THEN 
  CASE WHEN ( COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE6 ,0) <=  0)  THEN 'N' 
  ELSE 'Y' END
  ELSE '='  
  END RU_XAAS_PREPAYMENT_FLG 
  ,NECALU_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY as SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  
  ,-999 as SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT
  ,'UNKNOWN' as SUBSCRIPTION_CD   
  ,'N' OA_FLAG
  ,-999  as RU_EXAAS_SUBSCRIPTION_SOL_KEY  
  ,'UNKNOWN'  as SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
  ,-999 AS SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY  
  ,-999 AS CHANGED_ATO_CHILD_PRDT_KEY 
  ,-999 AS MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_KEY	 
  ,-999 AS MIGRATED_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
  ,'UNKNOWN' AS MIGRATED_ORDER_CLSFCTN_CD
    ,COALESCE(WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN') AS TRX_LINE_SRC_NAME 
  ,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGIN_SOURCE_CD 
  ,CASE WHEN WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN('ICMS-XAAS','XAAS-CCE','ICMS-XAAS-CCE','XAAS','XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM-SFDC','XAAS-ECOM','ICMS-XAAS-ECOM')
THEN COALESCE(WORCTL.ATTRIBUTE9,'UNKNOWN')
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS BK_OFFER_TYPE_NAME /*ADDED AS PART OF ATHENA Q2FY21*/
,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.CXEA_SUPP_SKU_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS CX_EA_PROGRAM_TRX_TYPE_NAME 
,COALESCE(LINE_EXTN.PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHD_NUMBER,-999) AS INVOICE_SCHEDULE_NUMBER_INT
  ,WORCTL.ACTION_CODE 
  ,'I' AS DML_TYPE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_ST_CG_RA_CUST_TRX_LN WORCTL
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
   ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL
   ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT
   ON(WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID = SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SAT.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
   ON(SAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY)
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_CG_AR_TRX_LINE_PREV_TRX_ID WATLPTI
   ON (WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WATLPTI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME = WATLPTI.GLOBAL_NAME)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL_ADJD
   ON (WATLPTI.PREV_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = SATL_ADJD.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
   AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SATL_ADJD.SS_CODE)
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN WIATLORDLND
   ON (WIATLORDLND.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID 
   AND WIATLORDLND.GLOBAL_NAME = WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME)
   
   LEFT OUTER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.XXCFIR_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_EXTN LINE_EXTN
  ON (LINE_EXTN.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WORCTL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
   AND WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )

   LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_CMDM_ADJ_REQUEST NACAR
   ON (NACAR.BK_SAF_ID_INT=WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE8
    AND NACAR.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
    AND (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_CONTEXT IN ('SALES ADJUSTMENTS','ICMS-ADJ') AND (WORCTL.INTERFACE_LINE_ATTRIBUTE9  IN ('ORDER ENTRY') OR LINE_EXTN.TRX_SOURCE_IDENTIFIER IN ('BSFT-OPL','CBM-OPL-CLOUD','CBM-OPL-ICMS'))))
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
   ON (WORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
 AND       WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CDC_MTL_SYSTEM_ITEMS_B ELMTL    
    ON (  WORCTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = ELMTL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
    and   WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC')	
                 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP2
        ON (NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = ELMTL.SEGMENT1 
        AND            WORCTL.GLOBAL_NAME='CDC') 
		
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECALU_SHIP
      ON (NECALU_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT = COALESCE(WORCTL.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,-999))
	  

   WHERE  WORCTL.LINE_TYPE <> 'LINE'
